title: Defining a Problem
description: The course is a comprehensive exploration of the fundamental skills and methodologies required to articulate mathematical problems effectively. Problem definition is a crucial step in mathematical problem-solving, whether in pure mathematics, applied mathematics, or related fields. This course equips students with the ability to dissect complex mathematical issues, formulate precise problem statements, and develop a systematic approach to problem-solving. Through practical exercises, mathematical proofs, and collaborative discussions, students will master the art of defining mathematical problems and identifying viable solutions.
